Question: What is your MOQ?
Standard Answer: Our MOQ depends on the product model. For standard items it is typically 500 units. For customized products the MOQ is 1000 units. Please share your specific requirements for an accurate quote.

Question: Can I order less than MOQ for a trial order?
Standard Answer: Yes we can accept trial orders below MOQ with a small quantity surcharge of 15-20%. This allows you to test the market before committing to larger volumes.

Question: What shipping methods do you offer?
Standard Answer: We offer sea freight air freight and express courier (DHL FedEx UPS). Sea freight is most economical for large orders. Air freight is faster for urgent shipments. Express is best for samples and small urgent orders.

Question: How long does sea freight take?
Standard Answer: Sea freight typically takes 25-35 days to North America 20-30 days to Europe and 15-25 days to Southeast Asia. Transit time varies by destination port and shipping line.

Question: Do you handle customs clearance?
Standard Answer: We can arrange FOB CIF or DDP terms. For DDP we handle all customs clearance and delivery to your door. For FOB and CIF you arrange customs clearance at destination.

Question: What payment terms do you accept?
Standard Answer: We accept T/T (wire transfer) L/C (letter of credit) and PayPal for small orders. Standard terms are 30% deposit and 70% balance before shipment. For established customers we can offer 30-60 day payment terms.

Question: Do you accept credit cards?
Standard Answer: We accept PayPal for orders under $5000 which allows credit card payment. For larger orders we require T/T or L/C for security and lower transaction fees.

Question: Can I pay after receiving the goods?
Standard Answer: For new customers we require payment before shipment. After 3-5 successful orders we can discuss extended payment terms such as 30-60 days net payment.

Question: What is your production lead time?
Standard Answer: Standard products: 15-20 days after deposit. Customized products: 25-35 days after sample approval. Rush orders can be arranged with 10-15% surcharge.

Question: Can you expedite my order?
Standard Answer: Yes we can expedite production for urgent orders. Rush service adds 10-15% to the order value and reduces lead time by 30-40%. Please confirm your deadline and we will check factory capacity.

Question: Can I order samples before bulk order?
Standard Answer: Yes we strongly recommend ordering samples first. Sample cost is $50-150 per item depending on complexity. Sample fee is refundable when you place a bulk order of 500+ units.

Question: How long does it take to receive samples?
Standard Answer: Sample production takes 5-7 days. Express shipping takes 3-5 days. Total time is approximately 10-12 days from payment to delivery.

Question: Do you charge for samples?
Standard Answer: Yes sample cost is $50-150 per item plus shipping ($30-50 by express). Sample fee is 100% refundable against your first bulk order of 500+ units.

Question: Can you customize the packaging?
Standard Answer: Yes we offer full packaging customization including box design printing logo embossing and insert cards. MOQ for custom packaging is typically 1000 units. Setup fee is $200-500 depending on complexity.

Question: What is the cost for custom packaging?
Standard Answer: Custom packaging adds $0.50-2.00 per unit depending on materials and printing complexity. We provide free design mockups and can send physical samples before production.

Question: What warranty do you provide?
Standard Answer: We provide 12 months warranty against manufacturing defects. If any defect occurs within warranty period we will send replacement parts or units free of charge. Warranty does not cover damage from misuse or normal wear.

Question: What if products are damaged during shipping?
Standard Answer: We purchase cargo insurance for all shipments. If products are damaged in transit please document with photos within 48 hours of delivery. We will file insurance claim and send replacements.

Question: What is your refund policy?
Standard Answer: We offer full refund if products do not meet agreed specifications or have manufacturing defects. Refund requests must be made within 30 days of delivery with photo evidence. Return shipping is covered by us for defective products.

Question: How long does production take for 10000 units?
Standard Answer: For an order of 10000 units production time is approximately 30-35 days after deposit and final artwork approval. This includes material procurement production quality inspection and packing.

Question: What Incoterms do you work with?
Standard Answer: We commonly work with FOB CIF and DDP. FOB (Free On Board) means you arrange shipping from our port. CIF (Cost Insurance Freight) means we arrange shipping to your port. DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) means we deliver to your door including all customs and duties.

Question: What is the difference between FOB and CIF?
Standard Answer: FOB means we deliver goods to the ship at our port and you arrange ocean freight and insurance. CIF means we pay for ocean freight and insurance to your destination port but you handle customs clearance and inland delivery.

Question: Do you have quality inspection?
Standard Answer: Yes we have strict quality control. We inspect raw materials during production and before shipment. We can also arrange third-party inspection (SGS BV Intertek) if you require. Inspection cost is typically $200-300 per visit.

Question: What certifications do your products have?
Standard Answer: Our products have CE RoHS FDA and ISO9001 certifications. We can provide test reports and certificates with each shipment. If you need additional certifications for your market please let us know.
